pi_items.source: Task description explicitly asks to save the workbook as 'Customer_Loyalty_Cloud'.
Standard default save path for Windows Docker container running Oracle Analytics Desktop.
Task description strictly mandates a 'Tag Cloud visualization'.
Task description strictly restricts the viz to the 'Top 50 customers'.
Task description explicitly mandates sorting/filtering by 'Profit'.
Task description explicitly requests a filter for 'Order Date' (Year).
Task description explicitly instructs to rename the canvas to 'Loyalty Analysis'.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for oracle_analytics_desktop_env create_tag_cloud_dashboard task. Verified that the expected filename 'Customer_Loyalty_Cloud.dva', visualization type 'Tag Cloud', filter parameters (Top 50 by Profit, dashboard filter on Year), and expected canvas name explicitly match the prompt description. Checked the underlying synthetic 'Sample Order Lines' dataset and confirmed the required columns ('Customer Name', 'Profit', 'Customer Segment', 'Order Date') exist. Discovered a critical defect: the necessary hook scripts ('setup_task.ps1' and 'export_result.ps1') are completely missing from the environment. This breaks the verifier completely because it relies on reading 'task_result.json', which will never be created, rendering the task programmatically unscorable.
